title: Reach Enchantment
description: A enchantement to increase the blocks you can reach
body:
The Reach enchantment allow you to break blocks further than the default distance, by raising your blocks interaction range.

This enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, found in the various chests naturaly generated and by trading with the Librarian's. Reach can be placed on every mining tools and have five levels.

- Default (White)
- Level I: +1 blocks (Green)
- Level II: +1.75 blocks (Orange)
- Level III: +2.5 blocks (Magenta)
- Level IV: +3.25 blocks (Blue)
- Level V: +4 blocks (Red)

![Reach ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m9riIbpQ/images/10b908ffbfc3e84e21fc2f091bfc7f4edb14d53e.png)
